title: Email Engine — locked intake brief (brief.json)
description: The P0 output contract. The brief is written from the turn-gated ONE-block intake ledger (intake/email-intake-questions.json) and validated by prove-email.py in intake mode. The one-block property is verified against an INDEPENDENT conversation_ledger export when present (authoritative — the actual transcript, not a boolean); absent an export the self-attested one-block flags are accepted as a recorded attestation. Any violation is a nonzero, fail-closed exit.

kind.description: Optional explicit kind hint for the prover's auto-detect.

asked_all_at_once.description: The six required questions were emitted as ONE message block (else AF-EMAIL-INTAKE-SPLIT).

one_question_per_turn.description: If present must be false — a true value proves the brief was split across turns (AF-EMAIL-INTAKE-SPLIT).

question_block_msg_id.description: A single non-empty id proving the questions were emitted in exactly ONE block (else AF-EMAIL-INTAKE-SPLIT).

objective.description: Exactly one of the 4 objectives (else AF-EMAIL-BRIEF-INCOMPLETE).

buyer_type.description: spontaneous | methodical | humanistic | competitive | all (all = a full 12-email buyer-type sequence).

offer.description: The exact offer / product / event name(s).

brand_voice.description: The brand voice / tone to continue.

sequence_position.description: single | landing-page-10-promo | high-ticket-appointment | convert-and-flow-buyer-12 (resolves sequence_type + preview count + subject mode).

founder_name.description: The founder's ACTUAL name for the close (no placeholder).

high_ticket.description: Optional; high-ticket uses two previews + the 80-87-char emoji subject band.

persona_style.description: Optional persona STYLE (tone only; the person is NEVER named/quoted).

offer_token_ledger.description: The exact offer name(s) from the offer answer.

client_overrode_word_band.description: true ONLY when the client stated an exact per-email length that overrides the 150-300 default; surfaced on the process certificate. Client-exact wins. The exact band itself is carried in locked_overrides.word_band_override.

locked_overrides.description: The LOGGED client-exact override channel (FIX-XC-12a). An override on the authored emails.json is honored ONLY when its identical value is echoed here — otherwise it is refused (AF-EMAIL-OVERRIDE-UNLOGGED) and the SACRED default re-applies. The honored source is recorded on the process certificate.

word_band_override.description: Authorized [min, max] word band that overrides the 150-300 default.

expected_preview_count.description: Authorized preview-line count that overrides the sequence-declared default.

subject_mode.description: Authorized subject mode that overrides the sequence-inferred default.

conversation_ledger.description: Optional INDEPENDENT transcript export (FIX-S36-47). When present it is AUTHORITATIVE for the one-block check: exactly ONE assistant turn may carry the intake question block (role in assistant|agent|bot AND kind/type in intake|intake_questions|questions|question_block). Absent, the self-attested one-block flags are used and labeled attestation-based.
